reasoning: Initial observation suggests a linear relationship between A, B, and Y. Increasing A while keeping B constant will help determine if A directly influences Y.
Increasing A had no effect on Y, suggesting Y is not directly influenced by A. Now, I will increase B to see if it affects Y.
Increasing B from 5.0 to 10.0 resulted in Y increasing from 25.0 to 30.0, suggesting a direct relationship between B and Y. Given the initial observation, Y appears to be solely dependent on B.
